name: DC Hub Nexus
description: Data center intelligence platform tracking 20,000+ facilities across 140+ countries. Provides facility search, M&A deal tracking ($51B+), capacity pipeline (21+ GW), real-time energy analytics, site selection scoring, and industry news from 40+ sources via MCP.

skills.name: Search Data Center Facilities
skills.description: Search 20,000+ data center facilities by location, operator, market, or country.
examples: How many data centers are in Phoenix?

skills.name: Data Center Market Intelligence
skills.description: Get M&A deals, capacity pipeline, and market analytics. Tracks 700+ transactions totaling $51B+.
examples: What is the total capacity pipeline?
List the biggest data center deals of 2024

skills.name: Data Center Industry News
skills.description: Real-time news aggregation from 40+ industry sources.

skills.name: Site Suitability Analysis
skills.description: Evaluate locations for data center suitability including power, fiber, water, and natural disaster risk.
examples: Analyze Phoenix AZ for data center suitability
Compare power costs in Texas vs Virginia

schemes.name: X-API-Key
schemes.description: Optional. Free tier: 100 requests/day without key.

dchub.description: DC Hub Nexus MCP Server - Streamable HTTP transport
